conversationHistory.content: Hello, thank you for coming in today to discuss the Python Backend Developer position at NovaTech Inc. I'm excited to learn more about your experience with Python, Fast API, and PostgreSQL. Can you start by introducing yourself and telling me a little about your background?
hello I am Abdul Wasiq, and I am 22 years old, Thanks for having me in this interview,
